eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Elko, NV; at 3:31 PM on MAR 27, 2019 Effective until 4:31 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Eastern Nevada Emergency Alert System from the City of Elko. Broadcasters, cable operators and the National Weather Service have set up the EAS as a way for public safety officials to keep you informed in the event of a disaster. Broadcasters provide this service free of charge as a part of our commitment to serve the community. Stay informed and safe by listening and watching your favorite local radio and television stations.  This concludes today�s test of the Emergency Alert System.
